exercises.name: Romanian Deadlift
exercises.notes: First RDL session — conservative start at 70 kg. Knee-friendly alternative to conventional. Watch for leg fatigue from Tuesday floorball.

exercises.name: Pull-Up Parallel Close Grip
exercises.notes: BW. Stop each set at RPE 9 — do not go to failure. Establishes baseline for bodyweight progression.

exercises.name: Machine Seated Row
exercises.notes: Old school machine — max is 45 kg for 3 reps. 10-12 rep range estimated at 30 kg (~70% 1RM). Adjust up on set 2 if too easy.

exercises.name: EZ Bar Curl
exercises.notes: Estimated weight — never logged. Adjust at gym.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: EZ bar, overhand (pronated) grip. Targets brachioradialis and forearm extensors. Conservative first weight — these muscles are weaker than in supinated position.

exercises.name: Face Pull
exercises.notes: Shoulder health / posture. Light and controlled. Estimated weight.

session_notes: Warning: Mon gym + Tue floorball (2h high-intensity) + Wed gym = 3 consecutive active days. RDL may feel heavier than expected due to residual leg fatigue from floorball. Hold weight and note RPE — do not interpret as regression.
